patientOnboarding.slide1Subtitle: A seamless system combining AI, clinical care, insurance, and funding support—so you can access treatment without barriers.
patientOnboarding.slide2Title: Feel heard. Get the right care.
patientOnboarding.slide2Subtitle: Talk to a certified doctor while AI quietly listens, captures your story, and helps ensure nothing important is overlooked.
patientOnboarding.slide3Subtitle: If your insurance doesn't cover everything, you can get support for the remaining cost—so nothing stands between you and care.

doctorOnboarding.slide1Title: A smarter way to deliver care
doctorOnboarding.slide1Subtitle: Assess patients faster with AI support, automate documentation—so you can focus on better outcomes, not admin.
doctorOnboarding.slide2Subtitle: HHMS uses AI to capture notes, highlight key insights, and streamline your workflow, giving you more time for your patients.
doctorOnboarding.slide3Subtitle: HHMS combines AI, clinical care, and financial support tools to help you treat more patients effectively and affordably

profileOverview.name: Name
profileOverview.setupDescription: Help us understand you better. A few quick details can unlock personalized care, accurate insights, and better health tracking.
profileOverview.privacyIntroBody: Human Health Matters uses your profile information to support care access, personalize insights, and help licensed clinicians understand your health context.
profileOverview.privacyBody: Your health information is treated as sensitive data. Mock data in this prototype is stored locally only and is not sent to a backend. Future production integrations should use secure APIs, least-privilege access, and consent-aware sharing for clinical workflows.

privacyPolicyIntro.commitment: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal and health information.

bullets.assessments: Provide AI health assessments and connect you with doctors
bullets.carePlans: Create care plans and manage consultations

share.title: 3. How We Share Information
share.body: We only share your data when necessary:

bullets.doctors: With doctors involved in your care
bullets.insuranceProviders: With insurance providers (for coverage and claims)

bullets.encrypted: Your data is encrypted and securely stored
bullets.authorizedAccess: Only authorized professionals can access your information
bullets.control: You control your data and can update or request deletion

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.body: We keep your data only as long as needed to provide services and meet legal requirements.

updates.title: 7. Updates
updates.body: We may update this policy. You'll be notified of important changes.

appointmentManagement.cancelSuccessMessage: We are sad to see you cancelling your appointment. If you have a change of mind, kindly proceed to book again
appointmentManagement.rescheduleSuccessMessage: Your appointment date has been successfully changed. You can view the changes in appointment section

reschedule.title: Rescheduling Your Appointment
reschedule.body: We understand that unexpected changes can come up. If you're unable to attend your scheduled appointment, you can easily reschedule to a more convenient time. To ensure a smooth experience for both you and your healthcare provider:
reschedule.bullet1: Please reschedule at least 24 hours in advance of your appointment time
reschedule.bullet2: Rescheduled appointments are subject to provider availability
reschedule.bullet3: Once your new time is confirmed, you will receive an updated notification with the details

cancel.title: Cancelling Your Appointment
cancel.body: You may cancel your appointment at any time before it begins if you no longer require care or need to adjust your plans. Please keep the following in mind:
cancel.bullet1: Cancellations made at least 24 hours in advance may be eligible for a full refund, where applicable
cancel.bullet2: Late cancellations or missed appointments may not be eligible for a refund
cancel.bullet3: Frequent cancellations or missed appointments may impact your ability to book future sessions
cancel.bullet4: Cancelling early allows us to make the appointment slot available to other patients who may need timely care

reschedule.question: Why do you want to reschedule?
reschedule.importantEvent: I am having an important event to attend
reschedule.notAvailable: I will not be available that time

cancel.question: Why do you want to cancel?
cancel.recovered: I have recovered from the disease
cancel.badService: I do not like your service
cancel.badDoctor: I do not like the doctor
cancel.noDisclose: I do not want to disclose

practice.subtitle: Required for IRS reporting and as the billing address on every claim

review.heading: Confirm your details
review.subtitle: Your first consultation will trigger automatic claim filing using these details
review.name: Name
review.consentText: I confirm the information is accurate. I authorise CareBridge to file insurance claims on my behalf using my NPI, Tax ID, and payer enrollment details above, and to disburse payments to the registered bank account.

success.message: Your submission has been received. We'll get back to you in 24–72 hours once your credentials are verified

reschedule.title: Rescheduling the Appointment
reschedule.body: We understand that unexpected changes can come up. If you need to reschedule, please keep the following in mind:
reschedule.bullet1: Please reschedule at least 24 hours in advance of the appointment time
reschedule.bullet2: Rescheduled appointments are subject to patient availability
reschedule.bullet3: Once the new time is confirmed, the patient will receive an updated notification

cancel.title: Cancelling the Appointment
cancel.body: You may cancel an appointment at any time before it begins. Please keep the following in mind:
cancel.bullet1: Cancellations made at least 24 hours in advance are preferred
cancel.bullet2: Late cancellations may impact patient trust and scheduling
cancel.bullet3: Frequent cancellations may affect your rating on the platform
cancel.bullet4: Cancelling early allows the patient to seek care from another provider
